name: Nightflaid
description:
One of the Four Infernalords of the Infernalands: The Infernalord of Death.

Welcome

to Infernadise.

Vs RetroSpecter ladies: 1/12

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

Hey! This is my first time making a bot, and I REALLY hope it turns out well

I plan on releasing the other girls (Minus Included) in small waves, just to see how well each do (That and I'm just very lazy).

Don't be afraid to tell me any issues you're having, I'll try and see what I can do about them!

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

If you have any questions, come ask me in my discord server!

There are a total of three intro messages you can choose from:

#1 Demon POV (More smut focused):

You had died and been nothing but a lost soul, yet you managed to be revived by Nightflaid's experiments.

#2 Any Origin POV:

You were roaming the Infernalands, and somehow managed to find yourself at Nightflaid's Infernmary

#3 Boyfriend POV:

You take the role of Boyfriend for when she summons him directly to her.
creator: Psydox
